notes:
DSV4-Flash runtime contract finalized — paged cache startup alignment + pool quant defense-in-depth.

DSV4-Flash production contract (vmlx 11a6713b, b2080d6f, 7cc4927c):
- Paged cache forced ON for DSV4 prefix-cache launches; stale 64-token app/session block size silently upgraded to 256 (native deepseek_v4_v7 composite cache requires 256)
- DSV4 L2 block-cache disk namespace now keyed by effective block_size — old 64-block records cannot mix with 256-block records on wake/auto-update
- DSV4_POOL_QUANT=0 pinned explicitly at every DSV4 panel launch; ambient shell DSV4_POOL_QUANT=1 cannot leak into production sessions. Opt-in via panel 'DSV4 Pool Quantization' advanced checkbox (experimental — restored-prefix logprob parity not yet proven)
- All four DSV4 env knobs require restart: DSV4_LONG_CTX, DSV4_POOL_QUANT, VMLX_DSV4_RAW_MAX, VMLX_DSV4_FINALIZER_TOKENS, VMLX_DSV4_FORCE_DIRECT_RAIL
- Non-DSV4 sessions never receive DSV4 env vars (panel-side dsv4Active gate)

Cross-family scope: zero changes to Gemma/Qwen/MiniMax/ZAYA/ZAYA-VL/Hy3/Ling/Nemotron Omni runtime behavior. All cli.py edits sit inside family_name == 'deepseek_v4' branches; panel changes gated on detected family.

Verification:
- 78 DSV4 + release-gate Python tests pass
- 213 DSV4 + settings panel tests pass
- Panel typecheck clean
- Bundled-python release gate green (vmlx_engine + jang_tools content hash + relocatable shebangs + 21 critical-import smoke)
- npm run build clean

DSV4 model artifact note: current WORST5-F32 bundle is coherent for general quality chat (no looping in 4-turn max-thinking gate, 14.6-17.6 tok/s with paged cache hits) but not strict exact-copy cleared. Public model upload is held; runtime/panel surface is finalize-ready.
